positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and graceful, abstract fauna like glowing butterflies and stylized fox silhouettes. Composition is highly symmetrical and central, creating a magical, serene atmosphere. Color palette revolves around deep indigo, ethereal teal, luminous gold, and soft lavender, set against a stark, matte black background for high contrast print impact. Vector graphic style, line art meets digital painting, clean silhouettes, perfect for apparel print, UHD, crisp details, volumetric light sources, deep depth of field.
negative: blur, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, grainy, noise, overly complex, photographic, realistic photo, cropped
